metadata.description: Skills and tools for agentic Power BI development including Best Practice Analyzer rules, C# scripting, and Tabular Editor integration.

plugins.name: tabular-editor
plugins.description: Agentic development tools for Power BI semantic models with Tabular Editor.

plugins.name: pbi-desktop
plugins.description: Connect to Power BI Desktop's local Analysis Services instance to enumerate models, query with DAX, refresh data, and modify metadata via TOM. No MCP server required.
